constraint.description: The specific policy constraint to be applied to the Google Cloud Project. This defines the rules or restrictions that will be enforced.

boolean_policy.description: A boolean policy is a constraint that is either enforced or not.

list_policy.description: A policy that can define specific values that are allowed or denied for the given constraint.
list_policy.type: list(object({allow: list(object({all: bool, values: list(string)})), deny: list(object({all: bool, values: list(string)})), suggested_value: string, inherit_from_parent: bool}))

restore_policy.description: A restore policy is a constraint to restore the default policy.
